original_prompt: create a wallet fornt end page

tasks.title: Create project directory structure
tasks.description: Create a 'wallet-frontend' folder inside the .ashborn-focus directory to serve as the root of the frontend application.

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project
tasks.description: Navigate into the 'wallet-frontend' directory and run 'npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --no-git' to scaffold a Next.js TypeScript app with Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and an src directory.

tasks.title: Update global CSS configuration
tasks.description: Open and modify 'src/app/globals.css' to include custom Tailwind directives and ensure proper styling setup for the wallet interface.

tasks.title: Create main wallet landing page
tasks.description: Create a new file at 'src/app/page.tsx' containing a simple wallet landing page with header, balance display area, transaction history section, and action buttons (send/receive).
